title: Sometimes silence isn’t
something you need to fix.
hero.subtitle: A small circle of women — no stage, no pitch.

notThis.label: Not that
notThis.title: Not an itinerary. Not self-improvement camp. Not “come back transformed.”
notThis.body: No one will varnish the day as a win.
notThis.closing: If you’ve been waiting for permission to prove nothing… it might live here.

steps.title: Morning
steps.text: Coffee. Window. No one counts your minutes.

steps.title: Middle
steps.text: Depth — if it grows. If not, fine.

steps.title: Evening
steps.text: Vanish into a room. Stay. Both allowed.

items.caption: Road without a mission to be everywhere.
Coffee because the body asked to pause.
Water near. Sometimes no words — and it isn’t awkward.
Light lowers. Something inside loosens too.

community.label: Not alone
community.title: There’s life beside you — not generic, but yours right now
community.body: You don’t hear only your footsteps in a void: presence lands without forced laughter.
community.note: That shy knot? It often dissolves not because “we all bonded” — but because the mask stops paying rent.

items.title: Close, not loud
items.text: Not “make friends fast” — just don’t vanish in a crowd.

items.title: Silence isn’t exile
items.text: You can be still in a shared room. That isn’t cold. It’s air.

items.title: By the water
items.description: Salt, wind, a day without a shape.

items.title: A few days, another life
items.description: Road. Light shifts. Evening with no punchline duty.

items.title: Bachelorette, stripped
items.description: Beautiful. Low volume. No contest for spark.

items.title: With a child
items.description: Small person near — and you still yourself.

items.quote: I braced to “connect.” I stopped feeling scanned.
items.name: Marina

items.quote: Not polished. Quiet. Time turned down a notch — kindly.
items.name: Alina

items.quote: Half a day silent, unclenched. So rare.
items.name: Sophia

cta.label: One move
cta.title: If you reached this line — maybe that’s already enough.
cta.body: A word. Any. We’ll answer like humans. No push chain.

form.name: Name
form.message: A line or two, if you want
